testcase.name: StepProgress > renders loading skeleton when isLoading=true
StepProgress > renders 9 step items when loaded
StepProgress > marks completed steps with status=completed
StepProgress > marks first incomplete step as current, rest as pending
StepProgress > shows 0/9 progress text when no steps completed
StepProgress > STEP_ORDER_KEYS contains 9 keys
FeedbackButton > renders thumbs-up and thumbs-down buttons
FeedbackButton > renders helper text
FeedbackButton > calls mutate with good type and agentId on thumbs-up click
FeedbackButton > calls mutate with bad type and agentId on thumbs-down click
FeedbackButton > passes stepKey and agentId correctly for ip-plan
FeedbackButton > has data-testid feedback-buttons wrapper
FeedbackButton > has data-testid feedback-good on thumbs-up button
FeedbackButton > has data-testid feedback-bad on thumbs-down button
stepConfig > has all 9 step keys
stepConfig > step1 has non-empty title and description
Step pages render > Step1 renders h1 with correct title
Step pages render > Step2 renders h1 with correct title
Step pages render > Step5 renders h1 with correct title
Step pages render > Step8 renders h1 with correct title
Step pages render > Step9 renders h1 with correct title
Tool pages render > Generate renders h1 heading
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: Tool pages render > Trending renders h1 heading
Tool pages render > Copywriting renders h1 heading
Tool pages render > Knowledge renders h1 heading
Module pages render > Diagnosis renders h1 heading
Module pages render > Diagnosis shows empty state when no data
Module pages render > Evolution renders h1 heading
Module pages render > Evolution shows cold-start state when no data
Module pages render > Accounts renders h1 heading
Module pages render > Accounts shows empty state when no data
Module pages render > DailyTasks renders h1 heading
Module pages render > MyTopics renders h1 heading
Module pages render > History renders h1 heading
VoiceChat page (US-012) > renders record button and turn list area
VoiceChat page (US-012) > shows idle status bar
VoiceChat page (US-012) > shows hang up button
ErrorBoundary > renders children when no error
ErrorBoundary > renders fallback UI when child throws
ErrorBoundary > renders custom fallback when provided
ErrorBoundary > resets error state on button click
StepProgress > renders 0/9 when completedSteps is empty
StepProgress > renders 9/9 when all steps completed
StepProgress > renders 3/9 when 3 steps completed
StepProgress > shows loading skeleton when isLoading=true
StepProgress > renders all 9 step items
StepProgress > marks completed step with data-status=completed
StepProgress > marks first incomplete step with data-status=current
StepProgress > marks later steps as pending
StepProgress > STEP_ORDER_KEYS has exactly 9 entries
StepProgress > accepts optional className prop without error
